title: Unibond No More Nails On A Roll, Double-Sided Tape for Reliable Instant Bonding, Multipurpose Adhesive Tape, Adhesive Strips for Indoor/Outdoor Use, 19mm x 1.5m Roll
features: Reliable Instant Bonding – The double-sided sticky tape ensures that no drilling or complex DIY is needed to hang items on surfaces. The tape instantly bonds to the wall
Multipurpose Adhesive - The strong double-sided tape is very versatile and suitable for mounting house numbers, frames, pictures, coat hooks and more
Indoors and Outdoor – The double-sided waterproof tape can be used inside or outdoors, on materials such as wood, tiles, metal, brick, stone, plaster and most plastics*
Strong Support – It can support up to 120kg per roll** in weight. This heavy duty double-sided tape is a professional and ultra-durable product that will stand the test of time
Package Contents – Unibond No More Nails on A Roll, extra strong and resistant double-sided heavy duty tape, versatile mounting adhesive for indoor and outdoor use, white, 19 mm x 1.5 m
Use craft knife or similar to help lift and remove red liner from top of pads if difficulty experienced with removing the liner
description: From the manufacturer About UniBond In the UK and the ROI, UniBond offers a wide range of DIY products – Grab Adhesives, Sealants and Tile Adhesives. By offering guidance and smart total bonding solutions, it simplifies every kind of DIY job both inside and outside the house. UniBond No More Nails - On a Roll Eliminate the Need for Nails and Screws in Your Walls! UniBond No More Nails - On a Roll is a double-sided mounting tape ideal for indoor and outdoor permanent mounting of items such as mirrors, pictures, frames, signs, hooks, bathroom & kitchen fittings, house numbers, mailboxes etc. The tape is designed for mounting materials* such as mirrors, metal, wood, stone, glass, most plastics and more*. The tape is highly versatile and durable, with immediate grip and can support up to 120kg per roll**. Versatile tape for permanent mounting of household objects indoors & outdoors No need for nails, screws, drills or cartridge guns Suitable for use on many different materials* Format: Roll 19mm x 1.5m of white foam tape with red liner *Not suitable for PE, PP, PA, silicone, wallpaper or other unsound or dirt-repellent coated surfaces. **Maximum holding power: 120 kg per roll under ideal conditions. i.e. mounting smooth flat objects less than 10 mm thick to metal. Temperature tolerance after application: -10°C to +80°C Mounting jobs done in seconds! Step 1 : Before applying, ensure the surface is clean, dry and free of grease and loose material. Clean the surface with methylated spirits for best results. Only apply to smooth and sound surfaces strong enough to support the weight of bonded items. Step 2 : Cut strips of the required length. Apply strips vertically 15cm apart. Press the tape down firmly, and then remove the red liner. Step 3 : Apply your item to the desired surface and press down firmly for a few seconds. The item cannot be repositioned after pressing down. Full curing strength is reached after 24 hours. High strength double-sided tape for simple household mounting jobs! UniBond No More Nails - On a Roll offers a simple solution for lightweight household mounting jobs on many different materials and substrates*. The tape is hassle-free and high-strength with each roll able to carry up to 120kg!** UniBond No More Nails On a Roll UniBond No More Nails All Materials Heavy Objects UniBond No More Nails All Materials Crystal Clear UniBond No More Nails All Materials Quick Drying UniBond No More Nails Original 3x Pack UniBond Cartridge Gun Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 7,055 4.2 out of 5 stars 434 4.1 out of 5 stars 513 4.0 out of 5 stars 208 4.7 out of 5 stars 3,788 4.3 out of 5 stars 413 Price £5.42 £ 5 . 42 £8.00 £ 8 . 00 £8.25 £ 8 . 25 £13.24 £ 13 . 24 £16.80 £ 16 . 80 — no data Format 19mm x 1.5m roll 1 x 440g Cartridge 1 x 290g Cartridge 1 x 390g Cartridge 3 x 365g Cartridge no data Colour White White Clear White White no data Waterproof ✓ ✓ no data ✓ no data no data Cartridge gun required no data ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ no data Characteristics High strength double-sided tape for household mounting jobs High tack adhesion for use with all building materials Provides quality bonding and sealing results that are crystal clear Quick-drying Multi-functional adhesive for interior use Multi-functional invisible adhesive for interior repairs Easy to use and suitable for all standard cartridges
